description_long: This object is a modern, minimalist easel with a sleek, rectangular frame and a thin profile. The front features a large, flat display area bordered by a white bezel and a light blue lower panel, reminiscent of contemporary digital devices. The rear is finished in a solid blue color with a prominent Apple logo, and the stand is a sturdy, rectangular base that supports the vertical panel. The side views reveal the extremely slim construction and the simple, single-post support structure. The materials appear to be primarily metal and glass, giving it a polished and high-tech appearance. There are no visible adjustable mechanisms or canvas holders, suggesting it is designed for display rather than traditional art use.
description: A sleek, modern easel with a thin, rectangular frame, blue and white color scheme, and a sturdy single-post stand.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the easel's ultra-thin profile and the single, central support post.
description_view_1: The front view shows a large, flat display area with a white bezel and blue lower panel, resembling a digital screen.
description_view_2: The opposite side view again emphasizes the slimness and the simple support structure.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a solid blue back with an Apple logo and a rectangular stand base.
